headline: Freeze clears; heat wave hits Monday — act now
weather_notes: Freeze Warning expires today at noon — keep frost protection on tender seedlings through midday.
Temps spike from 39°F tonight to 81°F Monday and 82°F Tuesday, accelerating aphid pressure on peas.
No rain through Tuesday; four consecutive dry days of heat mean beds will need water sooner than usual.
Warm dry air arriving Monday is peak powdery mildew weather for peas — check leaves by midweek.

surfaced_tasks.title: Inspect for aphids — apply Bt if caterpillars present
surfaced_tasks.reason: Overdue since Apr 17, and the incoming heat wave will accelerate aphid population growth.
